heading: Yarroweyah vs Yawong Hills — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Yarroweyah, Victoria and Yawong Hills, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Yawong Hills has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Yarroweyah (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Yarroweyah or Yawong Hills safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Yarroweyah has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Yawong Hills scores 21/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Yarroweyah scores 26/100 for bushfire risk. Yawong Hills scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Yarroweyah or Yawong Hills?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Yawong Hills has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.9% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
